title: dactylorhiza × szaboiana
intro: Dactylorhiza × szaboiana, also known as the Szabo's orchid, is a natural hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza sambucina. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × szaboiana include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
